WELCOME.text:
👋 Hey there! Welcome to *MathematicsGeek.com*!

Can you solve equations faster than a calculator? Let's find out! Let's play a *60-Second Vedic Maths Game*. It has 5 levels, and we'll teach you a neat trick after each level!

Are you ready? 🚀

INFO.text:
📘 *Vedic Mathematics* is an ancient system that helps students solve math problems 10x faster with zero stress.

Over 15,000+ students (Grades 3-12) have used our techniques to build math confidence!

Best way to learn is by playing. Want to start the challenge? 👇
